reasoning: Ethyl isocyanoacetate (EtOOC-CH2-NC) contains an ester group (ethyl ester of isocyanoacetic acid) and an isocyano (isonitrile) group. The ester functionality is the primary classifiable feature in ChemOnt; while it also bears an isocyano group, the closest available direct parent in the taxonomy is carboxylic acid esters.
